title: Sem's Immersive Weather (OVERHAUL)
description: An immersive and optimized modpack featuring ProtoManly's Weather Mod.
body:
Semedy's Immersive Weather is a heavily optimized and immersive take on ProtoManly's Weather Mod.
Uses Lithosphere, William Wyther's Overhauled Overworld, and vanilla-styled structures to make a seamlessly beautiful world.

Originally intended to be played with mob spawns disabled.

Modpack is frequently updated. (depending on how lazy i am lol)
Please report issues to the user, "_semedy" in the Discord.

NOTE: If your performance is garbage despite having a decent computer try allocating more ram in the instance settings.

(icon by whatsapp_2)
